task_completion.description: Verify that the required bookmark folders have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Chrome Bookmarks Bar or Bookmark Manager showing the folders: 'Oneworld', 'SkyTeam', 'Star Alliance', and 'Hotels'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the loose list of 30 airline and hotel bookmarks has been moved into the alliance folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Bookmark Manager with the previously loose bookmarks now placed inside the respective alliance and hotel folders, leaving the main bookmarks bar uncluttered.

task_completion.description: Verify that global security settings for cookies, popups, and the password manager are configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Settings showing 'Block third-party cookies' selected, 'Don't allow sites to send pop-ups or use redirects' selected, and the Password Manager 'Offer to save passwords' toggle turned off.

task_completion.description: Verify that site-specific exceptions were added for Concur and Amadeus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome Site Settings showing 'concursolutions.com' and 'amadeus.com' added to the 'Allowed to use third-party cookies' or 'Allowed to send pop-ups and use redirects' lists.

task_completion.description: Verify that a custom flight-tracking search engine shortcut was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome's 'Manage search engines and site search' settings page showing a custom search engine entry with the keyword 'fa' and a URL containing 'flightaware.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the browser startup behavior was configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Chrome 'On startup' settings page showing a specific behavior selected (e.g., 'Continue where you left off' or 'Open a specific page or set of pages').

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome browser GUI to make configuration changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Chrome browser window, Settings pages, and Bookmark Manager being clicked and typed into, rather than terminal commands editing Chrome's JSON preference files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use command-line SQLite tools to inject the search engine.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running 'sqlite3' commands targeting Chrome's 'Web Data' database to insert the search engine shortcut.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually sorted the bookmarks via the browser interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing drag-and-drop actions in the Bookmark Manager or using the 'Edit'/'Move' dialogs in the Chrome GUI, rather than a script overwriting the 'Bookmarks' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected bookmark folders: 'Oneworld', 'SkyTeam', 'Star Alliance', 'Hotels'. Site exceptions to add: 'concursolutions.com', 'amadeus.com'. Custom search engine keyword: 'fa'. Custom search engine URL must contain: 'flightaware.com'.
